\begin{circuitikz}
    
    % Place logic gates
    \draw (0,0)             node[nand port, number inputs=2](nand1){}
    ([yshift=-2cm] nand1)   node[nand port, number inputs=2](nand2){}
    (nand1.in 1)            node[nand port, number inputs=3, anchor=out](nand3){}
    (nand2.in 2)            node[nand port, number inputs=3, anchor=out](nand4){}

    % Internal connections
    (nand1.in 2)            to[short] ++(0,-0.4)
                            to[short] ([yshift=0.4cm] nand2.in 1 -| nand2.out)
                            to[short] (nand2.out)
    (nand2.in 1)            to[short] ++(0,0.4)
                            to[short] ([yshift=-0.4cm] nand1.in 2 -| nand1.out)
                            to[short] (nand1.out)
    (nand3.in 3)            to[short] (nand4.in 1)
    
    % Feedback
    (nand3.in 1)            to[short] ++(0,0.5)
                            to[short] ([xshift=1.0cm] nand2.out |- \tikztostart)
                            to[short,-*] (\tikztostart |- nand2.out)
    (nand4.in 3)            to[short] ++(0,-0.5)
                            to[short] ([xshift=0.5cm] nand1.out |- \tikztostart)
                            to[short,-*] (\tikztostart |- nand1.out)
    
    % Latch inputs
    (nand3.in 2)            to[short] ++(-0.5,0) coordinate(J)
                            node[left](){$J$}
    (nand4.in 2)            to[short] (\tikztostart -| J)
                            node[left](){$K$}
    ($(nand3.in 3)! 0.5!(nand4.in 1)$)
                            to[short, *-] (\tikztostart -| J)
                            node[left](){gate}
    
    % Latch outputs
    (nand1.out)             to[short, *-] ++(1.5,0) coordinate(Q)
                            node[right](){$Q$}
    (nand2.out)             to[short, *-] (\tikztostart -| Q)
                            node[right](){$\overline{Q}$}
    ;

\end{circuitikz}
